# Agent Manifest

> Cryptographic identity and provenance standard for AI agents

Agent Manifest is an open standard for the cryptographic identity and provenance of AI agents. It anchors the 10 artifacts that define an agent at deployment (system prompt, policy bundle, tool manifest, model identity, RAG corpus, memory baseline, decision trace, A2A delegation, supply chain, and HITL approvals) so a verifier who does not trust the operator can prove the agent running in production is the one that was approved. Level 0 is software-only Ed25519 signing; Levels 1 to 3 add TEE attestation (TPM, AMD SEV-SNP, Intel TDX, OPAQUE) and post-quantum profiles.

## Getting started

- [Home](https://manifest.agentrust-io.com/index.md)
